'''yashate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:aseismically|aseismically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-sh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:aseismically|aseismically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yashate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:yashate|yashate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yashatesher|yashatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yashatesherĂ«m|yashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yashatero|yashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yashateshĂ«|yashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yashateshĂ«m|yashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyashatero|gokiyashatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyashateshĂ«|gokiyashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyashateshĂ«m|gokiyashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyashankerom|goyashankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyashankeshĂ«|goyashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyashankeshĂ«m|goyashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyashankeya|goyashankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yashaterom|yashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yashatemu|yashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yashateya|yashateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyashaterom|gokiyashaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyashatemu|gokiyashatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyashateya|gokiyashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:yashashate|yashashate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yashashatesher|yashashatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yashashatesherĂ«m|yashashatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yashashatero|yashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yashashateshĂ«|yashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yashashateshĂ«m|yashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyashashatero|gokiyashashatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyashashateshĂ«|gokiyashashateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyashashateshĂ«m|gokiyashashateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyashashankerom|goyashashankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyashashankeshĂ«|goyashashankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyashashankeshĂ«m|goyashashankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyashashankeya|goyashashankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yashashaterom|yashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yashashatemu|yashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yashashateya|yashashateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyashashaterom|gokiyashashaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyashashatemu|gokiyashashatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyashashateya|gokiyashashateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:yĂŠshĂŠte|yĂŠshĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yĂŠshĂŠtesher|yĂŠshĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m|yĂŠshĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠshĂŠtero|yĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|yĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|yĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠshĂŠtero|gokiyĂŠshĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«|gokiyĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiyĂŠshĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyĂŠshĂŠnkerom|goyĂŠshĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«|goyĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goyĂŠshĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyĂŠshĂŠnkeya|goyĂŠshĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠshĂŠterom|yĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠshĂŠtemu|yĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yĂŠshĂŠteya|yĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠshĂŠterom|gokiyĂŠshĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠshĂŠtemu|gokiyĂŠshĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠshĂŠteya|gokiyĂŠshĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:yafshafte|yafshafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yafshaftesher|yafshaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafshaftesherĂ«m|yafshaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafshaftero|yafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yafshafteshĂ«|yafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafshafteshĂ«m|yafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafshaftero|gokiyafshaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyafshafteshĂ«|gokiyafshafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafshafteshĂ«m|gokiyafshafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyafshafnkerom|goyafshafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyafshafnkeshĂ«|goyafshafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyafshafnkeshĂ«m|goyafshafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyafshafnkeya|goyafshafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafshafterom|yafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafshaftemu|yafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yafshafteya|yafshafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafshafterom|gokiyafshafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafshaftemu|gokiyafshaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyafshafteya|gokiyafshafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
